ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being played */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in seconds */,
  "blue_wins" INTEGER /* Whether the blue team won the match */,
  "red_wins" INTEGER /* Whether the red team won the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* The date when the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* The time when the match started */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* The location where the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* The type of match (e.g., regular season, playoff, tournament) */,
  "match_version" TEXT /* The version of the game being played */,
  "blue_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the blue team */,
  "red_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the red team */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the match data (e.g., API, manual input, IoT device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_tag" TEXT /* Tag of the team */,
  "team_founded" TEXT /* The date when the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* The location of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* The URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* The URL of the team's website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* The URL of the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g. top, jungle, mid, adc, support) */,
  "player_birthday" TEXT /* The birthday of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the player */,
  "player_joined_date" TEXT /* The date when the player joined the team */,
  "player_left_date" TEXT /* The date when the player left the team */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* The URL of the player's social media profiles */,
  "player_rank" TEXT /* The rank of the player in the game */,
  "player_elo" INTEGER /* The Elo rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role FOREIGN KEY ("user_role") REFERENCES permissions ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission name (e.g., view_match_data, edit_player_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
